inputs.label: Distance Traveled
inputs.businessContext: Total distance driven in miles between fill-ups or over a period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total distance driven in miles between fill-ups or over a period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dolumlar arasında veya bir dönem boyunca mil cinsinden kat edilen toplam mesafe.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte gefahrene Strecke in Meilen zwischen Tankfüllungen oder über einen Zeitraum.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance totale parcourue en miles entre les pleins ou sur une période.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia total recorrida en millas entre llenados o durante un período.

inputs.label: Fuel Used
inputs.businessContext: Total fuel consumed in gallons over the same distance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total fuel consumed in gallons over the same distance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aynı mesafe boyunca galon cinsinden tüketilen toplam yakıt.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamter Kraftstoffverbrauch in Gallonen über dieselbe Strecke.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Carburant total consommé en gallons sur la même distance.
businessContext_i18n.es: Combustible total consumido en galones en la misma distancia.

inputs.label: Fuel Cost per Gallon
inputs.businessContext: Current price of fuel per gallon for cost calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current price of fuel per gallon for cost calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Maliyet hesaplamaları için galon başına güncel yakıt fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktueller Kraftstoffpreis pro Gallone für Kostenberechnungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix actuel du carburant par gallon pour les calculs de coût.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio actual del combustible por galón para cálculos de coste.

inputs.label: Number of Trips
inputs.businessContext: Number of trips or fill-ups this calculation averages over.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of trips or fill-ups this calculation averages over.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bu hesaplamanın ortalamasını aldığı sefer veya dolum sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Fahrten oder Tankfüllungen, über die diese Berechnung mittelt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de trajets ou de pleins sur lesquels cette moyenne est calculée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de viajes o llenados que promedia este cálculo.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
